metadata.description: dependsOn: [] overrides targetDefaults' ^build. The dashboard consumes its workspace deps (@open-code-review/persistence, /config, /platform) as SOURCE — every shared package's `exports` point at src/*.ts and the build runs esbuild --conditions=source — so there is nothing to pre-build. Kept explicit so a future ^build re-add can't silently introduce a build edge. (cli:build:bundle still depends on dashboard:build to embed dashboard/dist; the reverse edge stays absent because the dashboard no longer depends on cli at all.)
